nodes.label: Start: Is the problem an optimization problem?

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Convex vs Non-Convex Optimization</text>
  
  <!-- Convex Function -->
  <path d="M80 250 Q 160 150 240 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <circle cx="160" cy="150" r="5" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="160" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Global Minimum
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="160" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Convex Function
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Non-Convex Function -->
  <path d="M260 250 Q 300 100 340 250 Q 380 350 300 300" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <circle cx="300" cy="100" r="5" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="300" cy="300" r="5" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="300" cy="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Local Minimum
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="300" cy="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Local Minimum
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="300" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Non-Convex Function
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Convex Properties -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="120" height="80" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Convex Optimization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    • Single optimum
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    • Guaranteed convergence
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Non-Convex Properties -->
  <rect x="250" y="50" width="120" height="80" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Non-Convex Optimization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    • Multiple local optima
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    • Risk of getting stuck
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
